---
title: "Account"
---

# Register for an account

To apply for an account to the PEH Data Platform, go to [https://peh.vito.be/](https://peh.vito.be/) and follow the instructions.

Important note: 

Providing data to the PEH Data Platform and getting access to data from the PEH Data Platform is only possible upon signature of the [Protocol On the management and use of the Personal Exposure and Health Data Platform](https://vito-epi.github.io/peh_userdocumentation/user-guide/protocol.html)
